---
format:
  html
title-block-banner-color: "#ffffff"
---

<a href='https://esqlabs.com/'><img src='resources/esqlabs.png' style='max-width:100%'></a>

# ESQlabs R Trainings

Welcome. This site hosts the materials for ESQlabs R training events. Each event has its own page, protected by the password shared with its registered participants.

::: {.callout-tip appearance="simple" icon="false"}
## PAGE 2026 — Pre-conference Workshop · 1 June 2026 · Dubrovnik

R Workflows for advanced PB-QSP Modeling with `{ospsuite}` and `{esqlabsR}`.

[Open the PAGE 2026 workshop →](page2026/index.qmd)
:::

::: {.callout-tip appearance="simple" icon="false"}
## MoBi Summer School 2026

R Workflows for advanced PB-QSP Modeling with `{ospsuite}` and `{esqlabsR}`.

[Open the MoBi Summer School workshop →](mobi2026/index.qmd)
:::
